testcase.name: analytics.interface.tag.ooo production contract › main advocacy dashboard renders
testcase.failure:
[analytics-tld-contract] › analytics-tld.contract.spec.ts:4:7 › analytics.interface.tag.ooo production contract › main advocacy dashboard renders Error: expect(locator).toContainText(expected) failed Locator: locator('h1').first() Expected pattern: /dashboard|agentic|wsjf|advocacy/i Received string: "rooz.live" Timeout: 5000ms Call log: - Expect "toContainText" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('h1').first() 9 × locator resolved to

rooz.live

- unexpected value "rooz.live" 8 | const heading = page.locator('h1').first(); 9 | await expect(heading).toBeVisible(); > 10 | await expect(heading).toContainText(/dashboard|agentic|wsjf|advocacy/i); | ^ 11 | 12 | const bodyText = await page.locator('body').textContent(); 13 | expect((bodyText || '').length).toBeGreaterThan(100); at /Users/shahroozbhopti/Documents/code/projects/investing/agentic-flow/tests/e2e/analytics-tld.contract.spec.ts:10:27 attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../../test-results/analytics-tld.contract-ana-f31bb--advocacy-dashboard-renders-analytics-tld-contract/test-failed-1.png ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../../test-results/analytics-tld.contract-ana-f31bb--advocacy-dashboard-renders-analytics-tld-contract/video.webm ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error Context: ../../test-results/analytics-tld.contract-ana-f31bb--advocacy-dashboard-renders-analytics-tld-contract/error-context.md

testcase.name: analytics.interface.tag.ooo production contract › trading dashboard renders SOXL/SOXS content
